verified: Official The5ers Hyper Growth page - verified 2026-04-21
description: Israel-based prop firm founded 2016. Hyper Growth (evaluation), High Stakes, Bootcamp programs. MT5 + cTrader (added 2025, MT4 dropped). 1:30 leverage. $40K evaluation max, scales up to $4M total pool.

2-step.description: Hyper Growth evaluation target: 10%. Single stage evaluation with continuous criteria — no separate Phase 1/Phase 2.
3% daily loss cap (lower than industry-standard 5%). Measured from initial balance. Includes floating P/L.
6% Stop Out Level (strict — not 10% like most competitors). Equity cannot drop below 94% of initial. Static.
1:30 max leverage (one of the strictest in the industry).

instant.description: Instant Funded: 3% target for first reward, then 3% per scaling round (3-stage cadence).
5% daily loss for Instant Funded (higher than 2-step 3%).
10% static max drawdown for Instant Funded.

inactivity_policy.description: Account expires after 30 consecutive days of no trading activity.
